items.name: Lunella - The Bat Cinderella - Shoulder Pet Pal
items.description:
High above the Roblox skies, where the stars twinkle like diamonds, lives Lunella, the Bat Cinderella. Once an ordinary bat, she was enchanted by a moonbeam on a magical night, giving her shimmering wings and a heart full of dreams. Now, she soars through the night, spreading stardust and guiding lost travelers back home.

With every flap of her glowing wings, Lunella proves that even the smallest creatures can shine the brightest. 🌙✨

Color: blue / white
Position: right shoulder

Created by Dev_OnCake © 2025. Copyright protected. DMCA claims filed without warning upon infringement.

Tags:

items.name: 🐾 Mofu – Shoulder Pup [Companion Accessory]
items.description:
Meet Mofu, the fluffiest little guardian you can carry on your shoulder! This snowy-white pup follows you everywhere, bringing warmth, charm, and a touch of mischief. Whether you’re battling bosses or just hanging out, Mofu is always there to cheer you on.
✨ Highlights:
🐕 Ultra-fluffy 3D model with soft, round design
🎒 Shoulder-mounted pet that stays by your side
💖 Adds personality and coziness to any outfit
🎮 Perfect for casual, kawaii, or adventure game settings
🔍 Keywords: shoulder pet, kawaii dog, companion accessory, Roblox cute
